title: Set of 2 Decorative Replica Tea And Coffee Tin Cans | 2 Piece Birds Of Paradise Retro Metal Storage Tin Set | Tropical Vintage Style Metal Food Display Cans
features: DECORATIVE STORAGE TINS | We love this retro tea & coffee tin can set! They have so many potential uses, they work really well in the kitchen for utensils and cutlery or on the windowsill to hold herbs and plants
REPLICA VINTAGE CANS | The set comprises of two varying size replica food tins with eye-catching birds of paradise designs, each printed directly onto the sheet metal cans

DISPLAY CANS | These trendy versatile tins make ideal storage pots for makeup brushes, stationary, kitchen utensils or even as indoor cache plants pot holders, a beautiful addition to your home accessories
RETRO TIN SET | Our storage tins make impressive decorative accents for shelves, kitchen worktops or desks
TEA & COFFEE TINS | 2 design tins per set measuring approximately large 13cm x 11cm small 12cm x 10cm
